investigation_summary: WHO Code infant-formula marketing violations documented multi-decade (IBFAN); boycott since 1977. Cocoa child labor: underlying facts not disputed; 2021 SCOTUS barred U.S. suit under Alien Tort — procedural only. Axios-leaked 2021 internal doc: ~60% of portfolio below external healthfulness definitions. Senate baby-food heavy-metals inquiry implicated industry including Gerber.

profile.tax_summary: Swiss domicile historically favorable; ~21–23% global effective in analyst summaries. Routine transfer-pricing disputes in multiple jurisdictions.
profile.legal_summary: Cocoa: litigation since 2005; Nestlé USA v. Doe (2021) — 8-1; child labor not disputed but ATS claims failed. IBFAN annual WHO Code violation reports. California forest water permit (~$524/yr for 36M gal) controversial; state later revoked (2021). Leaked 2021 internal nutrition portfolio assessment.
profile.labor_summary: Cocoa child labor persists per Tulane / USDOL longitudinal studies cited by researchers — Nestlé Cocoa Plan since 2009 insufficient per third-party metrics. HQ Swiss workforce under strong labor law.
profile.environmental_summary: Brand Audit recurrent top plastic polluter. 2025 recyclable/reusable packaging goal missed per NGO tracking. Palm oil deforestation risk historically; suspensions after Greenpeace pressure; residual issues reported.
profile.political_summary: EU/US lobbying on nutrition, formula marketing, sugar taxes via trade associations.
profile.product_health: Portfolio majority ultra-processed. Baby-food heavy metals — Senate staff report; companies dispute severity but drove regulatory attention. Sugar across confectionery/beverage.
